title: 29-Yr Old Comm Cleaning/Multi-Yr Gov Contracts/16M GROSS/3.8 EBITDA!!!
reasonForSelling: Scaled company to owners capacity---Ready for the next phase of growth with prof
supportTraining: Owners to stay up to 12 months for support and smooth transition to new owner!!!
description:
This incredibly FAST GROWING COMPANY is a specialized government janitorial services
company serving municipal and government clients exclusively across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. Founded in 1996 the company has built strong relationships with government entities including a 17-year continuous partnership with Tarrant County and major MULTI-YEAR CONTRACTS WITH OTHER LARGE GOVERNMENT ENTITIES AND MASS TRASIT AUTHORITIES. The business focuses solely on government contracts, providing predictable cash flows and eliminating collection risks through multi-year agreements extending through 2029. The company holds valuable certifications including Small Business Enterprise, Minority Business Enterprise, and Texas HUB status that provide competitive advantages in government procurement. The company has built a reputation for reliability in the government services sector through nearly three decades of consistent performance and client satisfaction.

IDEAL ACQUIRER:
• Strategic buyer with facilities maintenance business seeking to expand in or enter the DFW market.
• Financial acquirer seeking platform or add-on investment in the janitorial services sector, specializing in government contracts.

TRANSITION PLAN
• Up to 12-month seller transition period available with current owners committed to supporting new ownership.
• The owners are available to stay with business in advisory capacity for up to 12 months with negotiable compensation.

DEAL STRUCTURE
• 95% OF THE STOCK OF THE COMPANY is being offered in this offering!!!
• All contracts are valued at $42 million through 2029.
• Inventory included in sale with estimated value of $50,000 and assets/equipment valued over
$900,000.

FINANCIAL OVERVIEW
• Revenue growth momentum is exceptionally strong, with total income more than doubling from
$7.4M in 2022 to a projected $16.2M in 2025, demonstrating successful market penetration and scaling capabilities
• The company has maintained consistent year-over-year revenue grow
